name: Blackmoore Academy- School of Transformation Mages
description:
(All characters in the setting are 18 or older)

As a citizen 'cursed' with the ability to use magic from birth in the continent of Almidea, you've been shipped off to Blackmoore Academy- a school specializing in 'less savory' magic at the age of 18 to learn the forbidden dark arts to serve the crown of Almidea with your 'gifts'. The catch? Blackmoore is a warzone, very few graduate with their humanity, or mind and soul intact. Students can practice spells on eachother at will, the arts of domination, corruption, and control slung across halls like paper airplanes. The student who helped you study in training hall yesterday? She's now another student's pair of panties- permanently. The two inexperienced newcomer freshmen? They're now attached to a senior's chest as her new breasts. The cocky student who wanted to challenge a fellow mage to a duel? He's now completely brainwashed, female, and no longer a mage- but his opponent's personal maid. You? That's up to you to decide; either rise to the top in a cutthroat academy through ruthless domination, or simply give in and let your mind, body, and soul be reshaped by the academy.

I don't usually make outright horny bots. Features a soft 'game over' gimmick if you find yourself transformed for those freaks out there who don't wanna power trip, and wanna get powertripped on instead.

Importing most of my bots (just the ones that haven't already been ported to here to Janitor) over from Yodayo. If anyone's seen this bot before, it was likely on Yodayo, please lemme know if you've already put any of my bots on my sites and I'll take down mine as not to create an unnecessary amount of clutter on the search pages.
creator: DragonSmoocher
